overview_text:
Your browser doesn't support JavaScript or you have disabled JavaScript.
Please enable JavaScript, then refresh this page. 
JavaScript is required on this site. Toggle navigation Begomovirus coheni (TYLCV0) Menu Overview → Distribution Host plants Host commodities Vectors Categorization Reporting Photos Documents Datasheet EPPO links Overview Code created in: 2001-02-04 Basic information EPPO Code: TYLCV0 Preferred name: Begomovirus coheni Notes One of the 'top ten' viruses in molecular plant pathology. Other scientific names Name Authority Tomato leaf curl bigeminivirus Tomato leaf curl geminivirus Tomato leaf curl Oman virus Tomato yellow leaf curl begomovirus Tomato yellow leaf curl bigeminivirus Tomato yellow leaf curl geminivirus Tomato yellow leaf curl Gezira virus Tomato yellow leaf curl virus TYLCV Common names Name Language tomatengeelkrulbladvirus Dutch Бегомовирус желтой курчавости листьев томата Russian more photos... Taxonomy Kingdom Viruses and viroids      (
      1VIRUK      ) Category Monodnaviria      (
      1MONVD      ) Category Shotokuvirae      (
      1SHOTA      ) Phylum Cressdnaviricota      (
      1CREVP      ) Class Repensiviricetes      (
      1REPVC      ) Order Geplafuvirales      (
      1GEPVO      ) Family Geminiviridae      (
      1GEMIF      ) Genus Begomovirus      (
      1BEGOG      ) Species Begomovirus coheni      (
      TYLCV0      )

seed.symptoms: Upward curling and yellowing of leaf margins; small cupped leaves; severe stunting; flower drop and very poor fruit set.
seed.causes: Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl Virus (TYLCV); transmitted exclusively by silverleaf whitefly (Bemisia tabaci); cannot spread mechanically.
seed.treatment: No cure; remove and destroy infected plants immediately; apply systemic insecticides (imidacloprid, thiamethoxam) to control whitefly vector.
seed.prevention: Reflective mulches to repel whiteflies; yellow sticky traps; resistant varieties (Ty-1, Ty-3 genes); insect-proof netting in nurseries.
